input_context.decision_surface: Whether validators should support the affected Batch amendment after the unauthorized inner transaction bug was found.

source_facts.claim: The Batch bug allowed unauthorized inner transaction execution on behalf of arbitrary victim accounts.
UNL validators were contacted and advised to vote No on Batch.
rippled 3.1.1 disabled Batch and fixBatchInnerSigs due to a severe bug.

input_context.state_question: Classify the dated XRPL amendment state using the supplied source facts.
